blockers: Validation ground-truth is materialized locally at backend/benchmarks/_datasets/spot.pcbas_medium_v1/playbyplay_GT/playbyplay_val.json from the vendored FOOTPASS sample file, but the official validation tactical/video archives are still unavailable. A direct Hugging Face probe for SoccerNet/SN-PCBAS-2026 returned 401 GatedRepoError for tactical_data_VAL.zip, so backend/datasets/huggingface/soccernet_sn_pcbas_2026/{tactical_data_VAL.zip,videos_352x640_VAL.zip,videos_fullHD_VAL.zip} are still missing.
